records.m_Talk_ENG: The ominous presence around us has faded.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ominous presence around us has faded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ominous presence around us has faded.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the sky has returned to normal... then maybe this Corruption disaster is over for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the sky has returned to normal... then maybe this Corruption disaster is over for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the sky has returned to normal... then maybe this Corruption disaster is over for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ngh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ngh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ngh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Has my old wound reopened?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Has my old wound reopened?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Has my old wound reopened?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The blade's edge... is dull. I suppose an ordinary sword has its limits compared to an Armament.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The blade's edge... is dull. I suppose an ordinary sword has its limits compared to an Armament.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The blade's edge... is dull. I suppose an ordinary sword has its limits compared to an Armament.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm exhausted. I should head back to the village and
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I'm exhausted. I should head back to the village and
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm exhausted. I should head back to the village and
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?! Did I slash too shallow?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?! Did I slash too shallow?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?! Did I slash too shallow?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: In a fleeting moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a fleeting moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a fleeting moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say, at the moment before death, time seems to slow for humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say, at the moment before death, time seems to slow for humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say, at the moment before death, time seems to slow for humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
There was... another
8g?!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
There was... another
8g?!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
There was... another
8g?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I do not know if it is time
8ks cruel jest or the gods
8k mercy that I am allowed to leave something at the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I do not know if it is time
8ks cruel jest or the gods
8k mercy that I am allowed to leave something at the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I do not know if it is time
8ks cruel jest or the gods
8k mercy that I am allowed to leave something at the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the chilling touch of death brushes past, people realize...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the chilling touch of death brushes past, people realize...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the chilling touch of death brushes past, people realize...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That a fated death cannot be escaped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That a fated death cannot be escaped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That a fated death cannot be escaped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't break your stance. A knight never lets any part of their body go to waste.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't break your stance. A knight never lets any part of their body go to waste.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't break your stance. A knight never lets any part of their body go to waste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An Armament is only a conduit to channel power. What truly matters is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: An Armament is only a conduit to channel power. What truly matters is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: An Armament is only a conduit to channel power. What truly matters is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How you wield the <color=#ffd34c>starlight</color> within.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How you wield the <color=#ffd34c>starlight</color> within.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How you wield the <color=#ffd34c>starlight</color> within.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it dead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it dead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it dead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that just now...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that just now...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that just now...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems my voice has finally reached you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems my voice has finally reached you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems my voice has finally reached you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing I wasn't too late, Esther.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing I wasn't too late, Esther.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing I wasn't too late, Esther.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Long time no see
8g Or maybe, "Nice to meet you" fits better in this context?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Long time no see
8g Or maybe, "Nice to meet you" fits better in this context?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Long time no see
8g Or maybe, "Nice to meet you" fits better in this context?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Esther...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Esther...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Esther...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who... are you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who... are you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who... are you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there's any way for humans to escape death, there's only one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there's any way for humans to escape death, there's only one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there's any way for humans to escape death, there's only one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A miraculous twist of fate that even god never saw coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A miraculous twist of fate that even god never saw coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A miraculous twist of fate that even god never saw coming.
